post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 284: Solar System Mafia

Important Rules:
1.6 Do not edit or delete posts
1.2 Do not post during night
1.7 Do not post if you are dead or if you are not in the game
1.4 Do not talk about anything related to this game outside this thread
1.1 Read all the rules!


Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, especially role PMs.
    • 1.5: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.6: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, a tip tag inside of another tip tag, among others.
    • 1.7: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, post again.
    • 1.8: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.9: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.10: Confirm your participation in the game by making a post stating the important rules that this isn't your first mafia game.
  • Voting/Elimination Procedures
    • 2.1: Post votes in code or bold tags in the format 
      [code]Vote: <insert player here>[/‎code]
      or 
      [b]Vote: <insert player here>[/‎b]

      Spelling and capitalization do not matter, so long as the "Vote:" part is correct (allows votes to be found with Ctrl+f keyboard shortcut).
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no elimination to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post Vote: No Elimination or 
      Vote: No Elimination
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, although you have the ability to do so. Unvote in the format Vote: Unvote or 
      Vote: Unvote

      An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Starting Day 2, If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be eliminated. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.7: Starting Day 2, If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for No Elimination, then there will be no elimination. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.8: If the deadline is met, no more votes wills be counted even if the mod has not made a post. The player with the plurality of votes will be eliminated. In the event of a tie involving No Elimination, no elimination occurs, otherwise whichever player got their votes first will be eliminated.
    • 2.9: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.10: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person eliminated (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • Activity Expectations
    • 3.1: Each day will have a deadline of 288 hours (12 days). The moderator may extend the deadline as they see fit.
    • 3.2: The night deadline will be 48 hours after night begins.
    • 3.3: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or their partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to submit an action for that night.
    • 3.4: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline.
    • 3.5: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.6: In this game, players are expected to post at least twice per 24 hours of day phase which they are alive. There are four posts of leniency on this threshold.
    • 3.7: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period or falls more than 4 posts behind the threshold, and the player is not in V/LA, they will receive a prod.
    • 3.8: If after another 24 hours the reasoning for the prod is not fixed and the player is not in V/LA, the player will be replaced unless the reasoning for the prod is fixed prior to a replacement being found.
    • 3.9: If a player is going to be V/LA, they must PM me. The moderator will not prod the player during that time unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette Expectations
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language or make any personal attacks.
    • 4.2: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.3: Be mature.
    • 4.4: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, they will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I, NDMath am the moderator of Mafia Game 284, and BananaBall00 is the co-moderator.
    • 5.2: This brown (#974E03) is my mod color. Do not post in anything too similar. This purple (#A64D79) is BananaBall00's mod color. Do not post in anything too similar.
    • 5.3: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.4: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Please read all of the rules, procedures, and expectations for this game.

Setup
This game uses the Matrix6 setup, a Semi-Open setup.

The setup will be created by picking all three roles in a random row or column and adding 1 Mafia Goon and 5 Vanilla Townies. Therefore the six possible setups are as follows
Setup 1: 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Town 1-Shot Buleetproof, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
Setup 2: 1 Town Cop, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
Setup 3: 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town Doctor, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
Setup 4: 1 Town Jailkeeper, 6 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons
Setup 5: 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
Setup 6: 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town 1-Shot Bulletproof, 5 Vanilla Townies, 2 Mafia Goons

After the specific setup is selected, the nine roles will be randomly distributed to players.

The mafia have a private chat in a private AoPS forum, that they may post in at any time while alive. To understand the roles that could be in this game, you can read the Role PM's and/or ask me questions. None of these roles are permitted to self-target.

Role PMs
Vanilla Townie wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are a Dwarf Planet (Vanilla Townie). As one of the many smaller planets, you are working towards eliminating any invasive, bigger planets that are against your team. You dream that one day, you and your friends will be able to rule with the good planets in the Milky Way.

You are a member of the town, the uninformed majority. The goal of the town is to determine and vote out the mafia during the days, winning when both members of the mafia have been eliminated. All members of the town have their voice and their vote, two very important tools to catching the mafia, two townies this game have an additional power they can use each night phase.

You win when all members of the mafia are dead.
Town Cop wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are Saturn (Town Cop). Known as the planet with the most moons, you seem to always receieve news no other planet can recieve.

You are a member of the town, the uninformed majority. The goal of the town is to determine and vote out the mafia during the days, winning when both members of the mafia have been eliminated. All members of the town have their voice and their vote, two very important tools to catching the mafia, two townies this game have an additional power they can use each night phase.

As a Cop, each night you may target a player to attempt to learn if they are a member of the mafia. Your result will be Town or Mafia, or 'No Result'.

You win when all members of the mafia are dead.
Town Tracker wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are Mercury (Town Tracker). The fastest of all the planets, you are able to keep up with what any of them are doing.

You are a member of the town, the uninformed majority. The goal of the town is to determine and vote out the mafia during the days, winning when both members of the mafia have been eliminated. All members of the town have their voice and their vote, two very important tools to catching the mafia, two townies this game have an additional power they can use each night phase.

As a Tracker, each night you may target a player to attempt to learn who they visited that night, if anybody. Your result will be a list of one or more names, or No Action Taken if they did not use any ability. It is not possible for Tracker to receive 'No Result' in this setup.

You win when all members of the mafia are dead.
Town Jailkeeper wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are Neptune (Town Jailkeeper). As the farthest planet from the sun, you are able to pull another planet far away from the other planets.

You are a member of the town, the uninformed majority. The goal of the town is to determine and vote out the mafia during the days, winning when both members of the mafia have been eliminated. All members of the town have their voice and their vote, two very important tools to catching the mafia, two townies this game have an additional power they can use each night phase.

As a Jailkeeper, each night you may target a player to attempt to both roleblock them and protect them from all kills that night.

You win when all members of the mafia are dead.
Town 1-Shot Bulletproof wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are Earth (Town 1-Shot Bulletproof). As your inhabitants are advancing in technology, they managed to add a layer around you that can protect you from destruction once.

You are a member of the town, the uninformed majority. The goal of the town is to determine and vote out the mafia during the days, winning when both members of the mafia have been eliminated. All members of the town have their voice and their vote, two very important tools to catching the mafia, two townies this game have an additional power they can use each night phase.

As a 1-Shot Bulletproof, the first time you would otherwise die at night, you will instead survive.

You win when all members of the mafia are dead.
Town Doctor wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are a Jupiter (Town Doctor). As the biggest planet known in the Solar System, you feel the need to protect all of the dwarf planets from being destroyed.

You are a member of the town, the uninformed majority. The goal of the town is to determine and vote out the mafia during the days, winning when both members of the mafia have been eliminated. All members of the town have their voice and their vote, two very important tools to catching the mafia, two townies this game have an additional power they can use each night phase.

As a Doctor, each night you may target a player to attempt to protect them from a kill that night.

You win when all members of the mafia are dead.

If there are two mafia goons, both flavors will be used. If there is just one mafia goon, a flavor will be used at random.
Mafia Goon; Mars wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are Mars (Mafia Goon). As the 'red planet' it was only natural that you would be converted to the red team. Named after the Roman God of War, you seek to takeover the Milkyway Galaxy one battle at a time.

You are a member of the mafia, the informed minority. The goal of the mafia is to blend in with town to survive during the days, whilst secretly killing of a townie each night, until the mafia faction makes up half of all living players. You may speak with you partner, USERNAME (Mafia ROLE), [url=]here[/url] anytime while you are alive.

As the mafia, you have a factional kill, which in this game is mandatory. Each night phase, the mafia must select one member of the mafia to attempt to kill another player of choice.

You win when the number of living mafia is at least half of the number of living players.
Mafia Goon; Venus wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are Venus (Mafia Goon). As the hottest of the planets, you feel that you are also the best. So naturally, you now seek to take over the Milkyway Galaxy (with some help).

You are a member of the mafia, the informed minority. The goal of the mafia is to blend in with town to survive during the days, whilst secretly killing of a townie each night, until the mafia faction makes up half of all living players. You may speak with you partner, USERNAME (Mafia ROLE), [url=]here[/url] anytime while you are alive.

As the mafia, you have a factional kill, which in this game is mandatory. Each night phase, the mafia must select one member of the mafia to attempt to kill another player of choice.

You win when the number of living mafia is at least half of the number of living players.
Mafia Roleblocker draft wrote:
Welcome, USERNAME, to mafia game 284. You are a Uranus (Mafia Roleblocker). As the coldest of the planets, just approaching another planet can be enough to freeze it from its normal actions with the temperature shock.

You are a member of the mafia, the informed minority. The goal of the mafia is to blend in with town to survive during the days, whilst secretly killing of a townie each night, until the mafia faction makes up half of all living players. You may speak with you partner, USERNAME (Mafia Goon), [url=]here[/url] anytime while you are alive.

As the mafia, you have a factional kill, which in this game is mandatory. Each night phase, the mafia must select one member of the mafia to attempt to kill another player of choice. As a Roleblocker, each night you may target a player to attempt to prevent their action.

You win when the number of living mafia is at least half of the number of living players.


Alive (2)
2. saturnrocket - Mars (Mafia Goon)
3. duke_of_wedgewood - Earth (Town 1-Shot Bulletproof)

Dead (7)
5. niuaccount - Venus (Mafia Goon)
6. hockeyfox - Mercury (Town Tracker)
7. violetmx12 - Dwarf Planet (Vanilla Townie)
1. NoSignOfTheta - Dwarf Planet (Vanilla Townie)
8. scannose BrilliantBanana - Dwarf Planet (Vanilla Townie)
9.BluePhoenix88 mathjay - Dwarf Planet (Vanilla Townie)
4. DXtreme - Dwarf Planet (Vanilla Townie)


Game Events
Day 1 Begins
Day 1 Ends; Night 1 Begins
Night 1 Ends; Day 2 Begins
scannose replaces BrilliantBanana
BluePhoenix88 replaces mathjay
Day 2 Ends; Night 2 Begins
Night 2 Ends; Day 3 Begins
Day 3 Ends; Night 3 Begins
Night 3 Ends; Day 4 Begins
Day 4 Ends; Night 4 Begins

Game ends!

NDMath wrote:
Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, especially role PMs.
    • 1.5: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.6: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, a tip tag inside of another tip tag, among others.
    • 1.7: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, post again.
    • 1.8: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.9: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.10: Confirm your participation in the game by making a post stating the important rules that this isn't your first mafia game.
  • Voting/Elimination Procedures
    • 2.1: Post votes in code or bold tags in the format 
      [code]Vote: <insert player here>[/‎code]
      or 
      [b]Vote: <insert player here>[/‎b]

      Spelling and capitalization do not matter, so long as the "Vote:" part is correct (allows votes to be found with Ctrl+f keyboard shortcut).
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no elimination to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post Vote: No Elimination or 
      Vote: No Elimination
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, although you have the ability to do so. Unvote in the format Vote: Unvote or 
      Vote: Unvote

      An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Starting Day 2, If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be eliminated. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.7: Starting Day 2, If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for No Elimination, then there will be no elimination. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.8: If the deadline is met, no more votes wills be counted even if the mod has not made a post. The player with the plurality of votes will be eliminated. In the event of a tie involving No Elimination, no elimination occurs, otherwise whichever player got their votes first will be eliminated.
    • 2.9: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.10: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person eliminated (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • Activity Expectations
    • 3.1: Each day will have a deadline of 288 hours (12 days). The moderator may extend the deadline as they see fit.
    • 3.2: The night deadline will be 48 hours after night begins.
    • 3.3: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or their partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to submit an action for that night.
    • 3.4: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline.
    • 3.5: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.6: In this game, players are expected to post at least twice per 24 hours of day phase which they are alive. There are four posts of leniency on this threshold.
    • 3.7: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period or falls more than 4 posts behind the threshold, and the player is not in V/LA, they will receive a prod.
    • 3.8: If after another 24 hours the reasoning for the prod is not fixed and the player is not in V/LA, the player will be replaced unless the reasoning for the prod is fixed prior to a replacement being found.
    • 3.9: If a player is going to be V/LA, they must PM me. The moderator will not prod the player during that time unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette Expectations
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language or make any personal attacks.
    • 4.2: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.3: Be mature.
    • 4.4: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, they will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I, NDMath am the moderator of Mafia Game 284, and BananaBall00 is the co-moderator.
    • 5.2: This brown (#974E03) is my mod color. Do not post in anything too similar. This purple (#A64D79) is BananaBall00's mod color. Do not post in anything too similar.
    • 5.3: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.4: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Please read all of the rules, procedures, and expectations for this game.

fdas wrote:
One huge problem I see with town is their tendency to believe claims at face value. These days, any random cat or dog could get out of being hanged by claiming a PR. This is frankly preposterous. Just because someone claimed a role doesn't mean they are town. On day 1, lkarhat was the top scumread before he claimed ghost, after which lkarhat suddenly became treated as conf town and the hang got pushed onto avanders who got hanged because he didn't decide to pull out some random claim like cop.

I see this a lot and it has always baffled me. Making a fake claim isn't hard and yet town seems to treat claims as gospel. Even when night actions look like this match up, like what kevin and midway claimed, it is entirely possible for the claims to be false, especially if the mafia make use of their own roles to emulate the roles they claim.

hmmm hockey might still be mafia

so
the problem with what fdas said is that he said this in a mech heavy game with a closed setup where it's much much easier to get away with fake claiming
in setups that are open or with less PRs, it is 1000% optimal to take whatever claim(s) that happen D1 at face value because
1. D1 claims are already a bad-case scenario
2. you dont want to make a bad situation worse
and in this vein even if the claim is fake, the real PR shouldnt cc because
1. if whoever claimed fakeclaimed as mafia, then it's mad sus if they're alive tomorrow
2. it's very suboptimal and arrogant for mafia to leave a potential real PR alive to mindgame
3. if whoever claimed fakeclaimed as town, then mafia kill them (a vt) instead of you
4. fakeclaims as town do happen for both the right and wrong reasons, so counterclaiming to out them as mafia isn't even guaranteed so you're potentially outing yourself for nothing
therefore it's always optimal to take D1 claims at face value and pretend they're true even if you don't believe it

let's say it's day 3, two people are mech confirmed town for one reason or another and the remaining three contain 1 scum

if the 1sbp is within the hangpool, they can immediately claim to reduce the poe to two people, which is gamewinning

on the other hand, if they wait until day 4, the remaining scum would consider claiming 1sbp so that the surviving conftown wouldn't figure out which of the claims is legit immediately (this strat may backfire if the surviving conftown is the 1sbp instead and the scum does not wait for the non-confirmed town to claim first, but it remains as a possibility)

okay im going to summarize my mindset in one post to make it as clear as possible

my minset at around 10am est
- you were towny just by contribution, there were things i didn't like from you but they were caused by confbias and nai / you were probably the 1sbp anyway by (a different) process of elimination. my brain told me i was just wrong, and my gut didn't want to admit this but i have a history of tunneling so my gut gave in
- duke is town, but not 1sbp because they didn't claim eod1
- dxtreme's d3 responses are towny and i have been tunneling him n2, there were posts by him i initially didn't like but some of them were read in the wrong context and not as bad as i thought. saturn also thinks dxtreme's d3 is towny
- phoenix's posting has been underwhelming but not outright pinging scum in any way. i assumed that saturn also thinks phoenix is the most likely solution here, and as much as my gut didn't like it she was probably right by reasoning and logic (and poe)

- phoenix tries to get the 1sbp to claim. i didn't like that at first, since why wouldn't town ask for agreement on a claim first? but why wouldn't scum!phoenix do the same?
- duke cced, which was unexpected and kind of puts saturn back into consideration
- i realized phoenix mg271 meta existed and was surprised by how different it was
- i almost snapvoted phoenix but decided on fakevoting her instead to rt first
- phoenix's responses were promising but they weren't too promising
- part of my gut wanted to snapvote her anyway, but the other part decided that i should be taking her defense more seriously and i succumbed to the latter half
- and now that my surface level poe is empty, i decided it is no longer dumb to consider the obvtown (saturn) not obvtown and i can now be giving the things i pushed to the back of my mind a more serious evaluation

MJ whom they replaced did nothing to mean they were particularly town but nothing scummy either. Saying violet was hiding something could be trying to draw attention to a town player or it's sincere. Phoenix hasn't had as many thoughts and has been sheeping more than when they were town in 271 but this could just be because they are a d2 replacement so they are not as familiar with the game. Paring with niu would work. MJ and niu intentionally had no interactions of note d1 and phoenix would be alone d2 and d3.

Scannose:
As you know I voted their replacement brilliant at some point because their play was a lot like when they are scum. I upvoted though and for a while I've been thinking their play was actually more nai because they would act that way as newbie town too. Saturn:

The posts you quote don't seem particularly scummy to me. While she might bounce around a bit between reads to me that seems like unsure town trying to contribute.

Now I'm going to go through everyone and talk about the possibility of them being scum because at this point everyone seems towny. Then we can see which one seems most likely.

saturn
d1 scum saturn puts a lot of effort into contribution to look towny and they succeed in doing so. They focus on drawing attention to voting out either brilliant or DX and try and disassociate themselves from their scum partner, niu as much as possible. When it appears that their scum partner might be voted out she does her best to subtly not get them voted out which doesn't work. d2 she supports a violet hang because she knows they're town. d3 scum Saturn focuses on tunneling scan and pointing out things such as trying to expand the poe.

DX
d1 intentionally has no interactions with niu and busses them to disassociate himself further. Being inactive at the deadline he is unable to prevent his partners death. d2 and d3 he isn't that active (as before) and fades into the background. Defends himself against Saturns pushes.

scan/brilliant
d1 brilliant is quite disinterested and un confident and plays the newb card. No associations with niu. d2 they are replaced by scan due to inactivity. Scan helps hammer violet "on accident" (or maybe actually on accident) and tries to expand the poe while tunneling Saturn. They choose Saturn because they are a player who is consensus town so it can help expand the poe.

Phoenix/MJ
d1 MJ is quite inactive and pushes violet to draw attention to them. Intentionally no interactions with niu. Inactive when their scum partner dies so no defense and he is replaced by Phoenix. Phoenix starts by sheeping others reads. Then she claims 1sbp so scum can find out who that is hoping to make it look towny.


So basically for everyone it could work. I do think DX and phoenix are the least likely though. Thats because claiming 1sbp would be a really risky move as scum and she had a towny reason for it (shrinking poe). I also really liked her response to voting. DX because they did the opposite of saving their potential scum partner.

In conclusion my new readlist
Townread:
No one is obv town unfortunately.
Townlean:
Phoenix; I know previously I thought they were scummy but I just really liked their response to people voting them and I do feel the claim could be newb town so they're up here.
DX; Voted niu when there wasn't a wagon and never defended them. The "scum slip" doesn't seem like a scum slip at all if anything its towny to me.
Null maybe scumlean:
Saturn; Lots of contribution throughout the game so higher than scan but
Scan;
Scumread:
Annoyingly no one is scummy!


I know that is quite different from my previous readlist and doesn't have any conclusive thoughts but thats because everyone is so similar practically everyone is town lean or null. I feel like everyone is somewhat towny and potentially scum.

So there's the conclusion of my wallpost, I have no scum reads!

As for as poe though mine is presently {scan, saturn}. Basically I think it's either scan or Saturn.
